title: T-064 — Docs: TEC-014 Bulk Import CSV prototype gap brief
prompt:
# T-064 — Docs: TEC-014 Bulk Import CSV prototype gap brief

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §6.5 TEC-014, §4A TEC-014
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Engineering brief unblocking TEC-014 prototype creation.

Document the wizard steps, validation rules per row (V-TEC-01..04), CSV column contract, error reporting format. The brief sets the parity contract that a future prototype + T3-ui must meet.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- design/specs/TEC-014-bulk-import-csv.md [create]

## Out of scope
- Prototype JSX creation
- API endpoint

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the brief is written, when reviewed, then it lists CSV column contract, 3 wizard steps, and per-step validation rules covering V-TEC-01..04.
2. Given the brief, when an engineer reads it, then they have a clear list of acceptance gates that must be met before a T3-ui task can be drafted.

## Test strategy
- Manual review by Quality Lead + UX team.
- No automated tests for docs.

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement UI or API in this task.
- Do not block other Phase 1 work on this brief.
- Do not claim the screen is blocked by missing prototype; implementation is covered by the paired spec-driven UI task.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
